name: Snatch
setup: Wide grip (snatch width, bar at hip crease when standing)
Bar over mid-foot, hips lower than deadlift
execution: First pull: bar to mid-thigh with constant back angle
Second pull: explosive extension, shrug, pull bar overhead
Pull body under bar into overhead squat position
Stand up with bar locked overhead
cues: BLITZ: Bar Low, Iniate, Thrust, Zip
Pull yourself under the bar, not the bar up
